result.summary: Found 3 issues: text truncation in navigation and game card grid overflow affecting content visibility

issues.description: Game cards in 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section are cut off on the right edge - the rightmost cards ('MAGNI...' and partially visible game) are not fully visible within the viewport
issues.suggestion: Ensure game cards fit within the container width or implement proper responsive design. Reduce card width, spacing, or add horizontal scrolling indicators if cards exceed viewport width

issues.description: Game cards in 'Top Played New Games' section are similarly cut off on the right edge, with the rightmost game card extending beyond the visible area
issues.suggestion: Apply same layout fix as above - adjust grid columns, card width, or gaps to ensure all cards are visible or properly scrollable with clear indicators

issues.description: Navigation tab text 'Hot Gam...' is truncated instead of displaying fully as 'Hot Games' or similar
issues.suggestion: Increase container width for navigation tabs, reduce font size, or use abbreviations that fit properly within the allocated space
